sub_modules.newton_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner form.
sub_modules.newton_derivative_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.newton_fixed_divide: Combinational signed fixed-point divider that computes p(x)/p'(x) with numerator scaling.
sub_modules.newton_update_step: Combinational Newton update block that applies x_next = x - step or holds on zero derivative.
sub_modules.newton_verify_fixed: Combinational verification block that checks whether the absolute polynomial residual is within tolerance.
